assumptions: The declared intragroup dividend has resulted in a recognised receivable/payable that is a monetary item denominated in a foreign currency.
The question concerns the accounting in consolidated financial statements.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 identifies hedge accounting as a distinct model and refers to fair value hedge requirements for gains and losses on hedged items and hedging instruments.

approaches.label: Cash flow hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 treats cash flow hedging as a separate hedge accounting model for highly probable forecast transactions and related risk management exposures.

approaches.label: Net investment hedge accounting
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 and IFRIC 16 identify hedges of a net investment in a foreign operation as a distinct hedge accounting model in consolidated financial statements.
